transcript.content: ugh honestly today was just such a mess. my boss dumped a bunch of last-minute work on me right before i was supposed to leave and i'm just so exhausted.
Today's already been a real mess . I'm so sorry .
thanks. it's just that it's not even just today, you know? it feels like everything has been piling up for weeks now and i can't ever seem to catch a break.
Feel better now ?
not really. honestly idk why i even bother anymore
You alright ?
i don't know, to be honest. nothing really feels worth it lately. it's like i'm just going through the motions every single day and none of it actually matters.
well. what do you wanna do you feel . how.it
i don't even know... i just feel so heavy all the time. sometimes i think everyone would be better off without me here anyway. i'm just a burden to my family and my friends.
work or what to you right
sorry, i don't mean to sound that serious or make you worry, i think i'm just really tired and overwhelmed right now. i should probably just try to get some sleep.
what you to what
yeah, sleep is probably the best bet. it's just hard to turn my brain off, you know? feels like as soon as i lie down, my mind just starts racing about everything i have to do tomorrow.
that whats are ? feel
yeah exactly... it's like a constant loop in my head. i try to distract myself with my phone or watching something, but the anxiety just sits in my chest. i don't even know how to explain it.
Citiz todreams

i'm sorry, i'm not really sure what you mean by that. my brain is just so fried right now i can barely think straight. i think i'm just going to try and close my eyes for a bit and see if I can drift off.
why arewhy areWhatWhy
yeah... you okay? your messages are coming through a bit jumbled. maybe we both just need some rest tonight.
you
it's getting late so i'm going to head to bed now anyway. thanks for trying to chat with me, i appreciate you listening. hope you have a good night.

yeah, i think i'm definitely going to offline now. still feeling pretty out of it but hopefully a night of sleep helps clear my head. take care.

bye, thanks again for being here. goodnight.

actually, are you still there? i'm having a really hard time winding down and the quiet in my room is just making my thoughts louder. it's kind of scary being alone with my head right now.
